output.summary: Test page verification complete. The test page at https://ign.localhost/test-gallery-carousel/ is rendering correctly with the new pseudo-element dark mode pattern. All 11 variations are working as expected. No page content updates were needed - the PHP template changes automatically apply to all existing block instances.

pseudoElementPattern.details: All 11 blocks have the container.before:absolute pseudo-element for dark background. The page audit confirmed 'pseudo-bg: true' for every variation.

noiseTexture.details: All 11 blocks have the noise texture overlay correctly positioned. The page audit confirmed 'noise-texture: true' for every variation.

padding.details: All blocks use py-18 md:py-23 on the container. Compound padding issue eliminated - no more inner py-9 sm:py-24 div.

inertManagement.details: Inert attribute management is implemented in GalleryCarousel.js. It will work on non-loop variations (variations 0-5, 7-8, 10). Loop variations (6, 9) skip inert management as expected.

autoplayToggle.details: Autoplay toggle buttons are present on variation 6 (Auto Gallery with loop+autoplay) and variation 10 (Autoplay Gallery with autoplay only). Page audit confirmed 'autoplay-toggle: true' for these variations.

ariaAttributes.details: All blocks have aria-labelledby pointing to heading ID. Blocks with autoplay have data-label-pause and data-label-play attributes for dynamic aria-label updates.

variationsSummary.heading: IGNITE Employees Demonstrating Excellence and Community Engagement Throughout the Academic Year
Autoplay Gallery
variationsSummary.note: Autoplay WITHOUT loop - inert DOES apply

pageContentChanges.reason: Block markup doesn't need updating. The PHP and TSX templates automatically apply the new pseudo-element pattern when rendering. WordPress stores block attributes in JSON - the HTML structure comes from the PHP template at render time.

buildStatus.reason: Build was already run in previous developer task (developer-2026-02-12-152301.json). No additional file changes made in this fix task.

notes: Test page exists with ID 106 at /test-gallery-carousel/

Inert management is correctly implemented to skip loop mode (variations 6 and 9)
